description_long: This object is a cylindrical can with a deep red exterior, featuring the iconic Dr Pepper branding prominently displayed in white and red on the side. The can has a metallic sheen, with a smooth, glossy surface and a standard pull-tab opening on the top. The branding includes the recognizable 'Dr Pepper' logo, along with additional circular graphics and text elements, such as 'Est. 1885' and the number '23', which are part of the product's signature design. The top and bottom of the can are metallic gray, slightly recessed, and the body is uniformly colored with minor highlights and shadows indicating its reflective nature. The can appears unopened and is typical of single-serving soft drink containers found in urban environments. No visible nutritional labeling or promotional graphics are present on the visible surfaces.
description: A glossy, red metallic can with Dr Pepper branding and a standard pull-tab top. The surface is smooth and reflective, with prominent white and red logo graphics.
description_view_0: The side of the can is visible, showing a partial Dr Pepper logo and the deep red color, with the metallic top and bottom edges in view.
description_view_1: The front of the can displays the full Dr Pepper logo, 'Est. 1885', and the number '23', making the branding most prominent in this view.
description_view_2: Another side view with a partial Dr Pepper logo visible, similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, with the same red and metallic features.
description_view_3: A slightly rotated front view, again showing the Dr Pepper logo and branding, but at a slight angle compared to view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: The Dr Pepper logo is visible on the side of the can, featuring white text with a red background and additional circular red graphics. The logo is large and centrally placed.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can displays the Dr Pepper logo and the number '23', which is associated with the original flavor, but no explicit flavor text is visible.
